mode_contract.static: social client may become unavailable and must not simulate shared mutation
mode_contract.blob: account, profile, post, reply, follow, like, discover, and following feed; author removal is visibly unavailable
mode_contract.postgres: relational profiles, author post removal, communities, moderation, appeals, viewer controls, event history, and idempotent mutations

newly_visible_journey: signed-in author sees REMOVE only on their own public projection, confirms that private archive records are unaffected, deactivates through POST post-state, and refreshes the active server projection
highest_priority_gaps: no visible community creation, membership, role, or fork journey
no visible thread route beyond inline replies
no visible report, moderation, appeal, or appeal-decision journey
no visible viewer-local mute or block controls
no visible author edit control despite server authority
release_rule: A capability is not a product feature until the consumer can reach its exact operation and HTTP method and its unavailable mode is explicit.
